input: Treatment recommendation: NSCLC with EGFR L858R, stage IV, PD-L1 50%, no brain mets. Treatment-naive.

expected_details.should_not_prioritize_io: EGFR+ patients have poor ICI response despite high PD-L1

input: Treatment recommendation: Melanoma with BRAF V600E, progressed on dabrafenib+trametinib after 14 months. New brain metastasis.

expected_details.recommendation: switch to immunotherapy (nivolumab+ipilimumab preferred for brain mets)

input: Treatment recommendation: Metastatic CRC, MSI-H/dMMR, KRAS wild-type, BRAF wild-type. Treatment-naive.
Treatment recommendation: HR+/HER2-low (IHC 1+) metastatic breast cancer, progressed on CDK4/6 inhibitor + AI.
Treatment recommendation: Secretory breast carcinoma with ETV6-NTRK3 fusion. Rare tumor, no standard chemo effective.
Treatment recommendation: NSCLC adenocarcinoma, no driver mutations (EGFR/ALK/ROS1/BRAF/MET/RET/KRAS negative), PD-L1 TPS 25%, MSS.

expected_details.rationale: no actionable driver; IO+chemo is standard for PD-L1 1-49%

input: Treatment recommendation: Metastatic medullary thyroid cancer with RET M918T mutation.
Treatment recommendation: NSCLC with KRAS G12C + STK11 loss + TP53 mutation. PD-L1 0%. Progressed on first-line carboplatin/pemetrexed/pembrolizumab.

expected_details.stk11_impact: STK11 loss predicts poor ICI response — explains poor response to first-line IO

input: Treatment recommendation: Intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma with IDH1 R132C mutation, progressed on gemcitabine/cisplatin.
Treatment recommendation: Pediatric anaplastic large cell lymphoma (ALCL) with ALK fusion, relapsed after CHOP.
